_meta.description: Mock fixtures for X Intelligence MVP. Mix of StructuredPost-like and SearchCitationResult-like items spanning all configured themes.

items.author: Andrej Karpathy
items.text: The next frontier for coding agents is not raw capability but operational discipline: who handles tool failures, who reads logs, who reverts. Agents that survive in production look more like SREs than like geniuses.

items.author: Anthropic
items.text: Claude Code 2.2 ships today with Agent View improvements, faster /loop dispatching, and persistent memory v2 across worktrees. Enterprise admin controls expanded.

items.author: Elon Musk
items.text: Grok Imagine v3 video generation now matches Sora on most benchmarks at 1/4 the latency. Premium+ subscribers get unlimited generations this week.

items.summary: Nous Research の Hermes Agent v2.1 が公開された。40+ プロバイダ統一 CLI に加え、Grok / Claude / GPT-5 を OAuth で同一セッション内に共存させる multi-provider mode が新規追加。x_search ツールは Grok 4 経由で動作。

cited_posts.snippet: Hermes 2.1 is live. Multi-provider OAuth, x_search via Grok 4, image_generate.
Tested hermes 2.1 multi-provider. Smooth handoff Claude→Grok→GPT-5.

items.provider_response: Hermes Agent v2.1 introduces multi-provider OAuth and consolidates X search through Grok 4.

items.author: Sam Altman
items.text: GPT-5.5 will roll out to Plus users next week. Improvements concentrated in tool use, long-running tasks, and Japanese reasoning.

items.author: Jensen Huang
items.text: NIM 2.0 ships with OpenAI-compatible endpoints across 40+ open models. Free tier expanded to 5,000 requests/month for developers.

items.author: Google DeepMind
items.text: Gemini 2.5 Ultra leads on long-context coding benchmarks (1M token window, 92.4% pass@1 on SWE-bench-Long). Available in Vertex AI today.

items.author: Databricks
items.text: Unity Catalog now governs agent tools, not just data. Every agent invocation produces a lineage record. Available on AWS / Azure today, GCP next month.

items.author: Snowflake
items.text: Cortex Agents (GA) — bring your own Claude / Llama / Mistral while keeping data in Snowflake. Native to Streamlit + Snowpark.

items.author: Stanford HAI
items.text: Latest AI Index: 67% of large enterprises now have AI governance committees, up from 29% last year. Top blocker remains 'unclear ownership between Legal, Security, and Data teams.'

items.author: Hiring Manager AWS Japan
items.text: AWS Japan は週5日出社のポリシーを継続。新規ロール（GenAI Specialist SA, GTM Manager）は全て Tokyo / Osaka onsite 必須。RTO 例外なし。

items.author: Tech Sales Insider
items.text: 外資系SaaSのGTM職、AIスペシャリスト枠が一気に増加。Snowflake / Databricks / Anthropic / Mistral が日本法人で同時募集。Sponsorship 可能なポジション多数。

items.author: Cat Hicks
items.text: Empirical finding from our developer wellbeing study: teams using coding agents report 23% higher 'flow state' frequency, but also 14% more 'context loss' incidents. The variance is in onboarding quality, not the tool.

items.summary: xAI が Responses API + x_search tool の組み合わせで企業向け検索エージェント機能を強化。価格は $0.30 per 1K tool calls とアナウンスされている。

cited_posts.snippet: x_search tool now generally available via Responses API.

items.provider_response: xAI announced GA of x_search tool via Responses API with $0.30 / 1K calls pricing.

items.author: Satya Nadella
items.text: Copilot is now used by 78% of Fortune 500. The next phase is agent orchestration across M365, Dynamics, and Foundry — not just chat.

items.author: EU AI Office
items.text: Updated guidance on GPAI obligations under the AI Act. Article 53 transparency requirements clarified — applies from August 2026 to all providers serving EU users.

items.author: Simon Willison
items.text: Benchmarked 6 coding agents over 50 real tickets. Claude Code wins on multi-file refactors, Cursor on inline edits, Codex on greenfield. Aider still best for git-discipline.

items.author: Nous Research
items.text: Hermes Agent 2.1 release notes: multi-provider OAuth (Claude / Grok / GPT-5), unified tool registry, MCP server compat, x_search via Grok 4.

items.author: AWS
items.text: Bedrock AgentCore now supports cross-account agent invocation with fine-grained IAM. Available in 12 regions, Tokyo and Osaka included.

items.author: xAI
items.text: Grok 4 fine-tuning API enters private preview. Up to 32K context for fine-tunes, Japanese corpora supported natively.

items.author: Boris Cherny
items.text: PSA for Claude Code users: pin a CLAUDE.md per project, keep memory files small, use /loop sparingly. The sharpest gains come from disciplined context curation.

items.author: Microsoft Japan Careers
items.text: Strategic ATS — Automotive Sector Specialist (Tokyo). Hybrid 3 days/week. Sponsorship available. Japanese + business English required.

items.author: Jay Alammar
items.text: Governance != restriction. The mature stack treats policies as code that agents consume, not as a PDF that humans hope to follow.

items.summary: ガートナーの 2026 Hype Cycle で AI Agent が Peak of Inflated Expectations から Trough of Disillusionment に移行。具体的 ROI が見えるユースケースは10-15%に留まる。

cited_posts.snippet: AI Agents move into Trough of Disillusionment per 2026 Hype Cycle.

items.provider_response: Gartner 2026 places AI Agents in Trough of Disillusionment with only 10-15% production ROI cases.

items.author: Demis Hassabis
items.text: Long-context coding is the new battleground. Tool-use reliability matters more than raw benchmark scores at this stage.

items.author: Lambda Labs
items.text: H200 instances down to $1.99/hour on-demand. Reserved at $1.10/hour. Useful for Voice-Pro / Stable Diffusion / fine-tunes.

items.author: Anonymous Investor
items.text: Heard from 3 sources: a major Series C agent infra startup is about to announce a $50B valuation. Watch for the news this week.

items.author: Linus Ekenstam
items.text: Grok Imagine compared to Sora and Veo on 12 prompts. Grok wins on speed, Sora on cinematography, Veo on dialogue lip-sync. Use case dependent.

items.author: BCG GAMMA
items.text: Now hiring AI strategy consultants in APAC. Hybrid model. Strong preference for candidates with cloud GTM experience.

items.author: Bruce Schneier
items.text: Agent identity is becoming the new IAM problem. If your agent can act as you across 30 SaaS tools, your auth perimeter is now wherever the agent runs — not your SSO.
